title: rubus × biacanthus
intro: Rubus × biacanthus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry rose, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Rubus genus and is primarily found in the Himalayan regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × biacanthus include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits.
